description: Minimalist styling on a link strap watch from maxima for women, the patterning on the bracelet of this watch is perfect for dressy and casual occasions. Contouring your wrist, this timepiece lends a class to any off-duty ensemble. Case diameter: 22 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Ssteele logo on the 12-hour mark Adjust-o-matic links and butterfly closure White dial with quartz movement Screw to reset time and alarm Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rain
